steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the main idea of the whole passage. The final sentence is the thesis: Morales sees both her approaches — celebrating cultural icons and honoring ordinary people — as ways of depicting human power and interconnectedness.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Morales began her artistic career by painting portraits of famous people and then transitioned to depicting everyday people instead.": the passage describes two simultaneous approaches, not a career progression. ✗
  • "Morales's works focus on recognizing both famous and everyday examples of human strength and connection.": directly matches the thesis. ✓
  • "Morales's portrayal of a woman making tortillas focuses more on human connection than it does on human resilience.": the passage makes no such distinction between the two works. ✗
  • "Morales's depiction of boxer Roberto Duran receives more attention from scholars than her depiction of a woman making tortillas does.": comparative attention from scholars is never mentioned. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
